best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-user-002 title: user login module: user source pages: 2 preconditions: user is registered. test data: - email: testuser@example.com - password: testpassword123 test steps: 1. open the login form on the ui. 2. enter the email and password. 3. click on the "login" button. 4. wait for the firebaseauthentication component to validate the login. 5. check if the login is successful. expected result: the user should be logged in successfully and redirected to the dashboard.

test case id: tc-category-001 title: create category module: category source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - description: new category - name: new category name test steps: 1. click on the "create category" button. 2. enter the category description and name. 3. click on the "save" button. 4. wait for the firebaseauthentication component to validate the category creation. 5. check if the category is created successfully. expected result: the category should be created successfully and listed in the user's categories.
